What it measures: Weighted service intensity, diversity and category exposure (POI / 500 m grid)
Boundary (does not support): Not demand, welfare, sentiment or access

What it measures: Host propensity under venue type, service exposure, rule proximity and topology
Boundary (does not support): Candidate status is not confirmed permission

What it measures: Official, operator, reported and contextual rule records by source class

Boundary (does not support): Silence is not interpreted as refusal

What it measures: Composite of service ecology, host opportunity, rule signal and topology
Service-rule gap, rule silence and under-translation
Frontier grids vs matched controls on ecology and morphology
